parameters.query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gda_competitor_crawls (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  competitor_name TEXT NOT NULL,
  crawl_data JSONB NOT NULL,
  changes_detected JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
  change_count INT DEFAULT 0,
  significance TEXT DEFAULT 'LOW',
  previous_crawl_id INT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);
SELECT 'tables_ready' as status
SELECT name, threat_level, capabilities FROM gda_competitor_watchlist WHERE name IS NOT NULL AND name != '' LIMIT 10
SELECT id, crawl_data, created_at FROM gda_competitor_crawls WHERE competitor_name = '{{ $('Build Competitor Queries').first().json.name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
